Results
6.1
Machine Translation
On the WMT 2014 English-to-German translation task, the big transformer model (Transformer (big)
in Table 2) outperforms the best previously reported models (including ensembles) by more than 2.0
BLEU, establishing a new state-of-the-art BLEU score of 28.4.
concepts.implication: Architecture pattern applicable to sequence modeling for user behavior

concepts.finding:
Our results in Table 4 show that despite the lack of task-speciﬁc tuning our model performs sur-
prisingly well, yielding better results than all previously reported models with the exception of the
Recurrent Neural Network Grammar [8].
concepts.implication: General ML methodology applicable to content recommendation
